speaker: MATT
raw_text: It is quite a busy time in the afternoon. There is actually a bit of hustle and bustle. Looking around, just a quick glance at your vicinity in Vasselheim, you can see a lot of the bastions are out in force. Many of them are in process of helping construct what looks like reinforced dragon-headed ballistae. Some of the ones you had seen towards the outside walls of the city. There are more being installed upon the inner walls, and the ones in the distance appear to be under some form of construction.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know that you all have a lot of errands to do. I don't need everyone to come.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have a lot of errands to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: My only errand is to keep my eyes on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I have some errands, if that makes anybody feel better. I have some errands to run.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you need any help with your errands?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Actually, yes. I would love some help with my errands.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't let him shop, Percy. Do not let him shop.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what that means, but I'm sure I take great offense.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That eagle form really made a difference.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where is this Raven Queen's temple?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) We've not been here many times. Are we surrounded by people? Are there people walking about?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "As far as this town is concerned, it takes a lot more than a couple dragons to drop these walls. It's the reason it's been around for a long time, and I'd like to see them try."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, what was the question?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, when you don't take notes when I give you a character's name originally, and they come back around and it's weird when you suddenly take damage and your character starts hemorrhaging.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. Loran. Loran was his name.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was just eating an apple. Why am I dying?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm just sitting by the fire, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we have seen this guy before?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Some of you may have seen him in passing. You haven't really had a conversation with him. He just exists within the guild. There's many members that you've come across in the past.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How are the people doing? Is there a sense of worry, or do you guys feel pretty secure?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The door (whoosh) swings open. You have to duck backwards. It (thump) slams onto the other side of the wall there, knocking a few knick-knacks that were on a nearby shelf over. And Vanessa swings out. "What? Who's calling-- ah. It has been some time. How nice of you to come and visit. May I... be of service to you?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we try to sell Vanessa some of our dragon bits?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We should sell to a merchant?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, they tend to be in the--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Love that you asked me that question.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, right? What was I thinking?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Keep a few of the scales, obviously.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We can tell what my place in the party is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course. Grog, come with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, wait, keep the teeth. Keep enough teeth for us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll talk about the cold bag for now and see if there's anything else they want to talk about.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I have an idea for teeth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You go and knock on the door. (knocks) There's a brief pause. Knock again. (knocks)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (sing-song) Vanessa? Vox Machina here-- oh, hi.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 23. You understand the Raven Queen has also not always been the one who holds sway over the domain of death, the domain of winter, the domain of fate. Once mortal, the Raven Queen ascended as, essentially, a follower and a partner to the previous god of death, which his name has been erased from the books. This mortal ascended many, many years ago, pre-Second Spark, and has since taken what was once a tyrannical position of death and afterlife and souls and took it instead as the natural transition that it is. However, due to a lack of respect, or at least, a lack of, for lack of a better term, belief or trust from the other gods, she only gained dominion over the actual moment of transition, not of the actual souls of the afterlife. That influence was given to others. But the Raven Queen represents one of the most feared elements of life, which is the end of it, but you also know that that is a natural thing. Your personal belief is up to you. The sense you get here is that... being an individual that worships life, that worships redemption, that worships second chances, you can't help but swallow a little hard at the idea of a god that's purpose is to make sure that if you're destined to have once chance, it stays one chance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kind of. Or like a very, very dark pair of sunglasses, but made of naturally-formed rock, almost.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Noticing that, I turn and just sort of look at my sister for 5 or 10 more seconds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She doesn't see you and she just stands there quietly, looking around, inspecting the vicinity. Pets Trinket a little.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I feel anything, being in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You just feel a natural tremble stepping into a place of powerful divine influence that is not the warm comfort of Sarenrae, which has protected you before. Now, you understand the way many deities work in these lands, and your place in it, and Sarenrae's place in it, and you know enough about the Raven Queen to know that this is not an unwelcome place, per se. Go ahead and roll a religion check.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Then perhaps you'll find those answers one day."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I stand at the bottom of the stairs and I watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (hoarsely) I got answers in there, but they led to more questions. What am I to do with those questions?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The woman who had led you in there smiles and says, "That is the nature of death. We can't have all the answers, my friend. It is the pursuit of those answers that drives us. Do you trust Her?"

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So after about five minutes or so, she grinds down with what materials she has to a little more-- it does mess with some of the polish on the very tip of the metal, but it does come to a more solid point. "Be careful with that."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And the rest buckles to the back of the head, so it's a giant metallic groove for the front.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll take it. I don't even care if it fits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, that's what I like to hear."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And I reach up and I... hit it with my finger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's all right. It can be sharpened. It's more for decor. It's not meant to slice somebody in half.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, I mean, what are you intending to do with this hat? (titters)"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I can do that for you, my big muscley man."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is the very ceiling of intelligence of his.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, see that sweet jam I just dropped there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I did, that was a good line.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Write that in a notebook somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll be cleaning that off the floor for ages.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Ooh, all up front? All right. It'll be ready for you shortly." She takes the coin. "Thank you for the patronage. Return here in about... ooh, an hour, and the hat shall be prepared for you, sir-- what's your name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow. I mean, your silhouette is magnificent. Imposing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this your variant fighting costume?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You are. You are. We should go to a silhouette artist after this and get something drawn for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They do, they cut it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Milady, you are a master of your trade.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Our mom only gave us 60 gold to spend. Could you give us both hats for 60? We're brothers. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Something went wrong with him at birth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check with disadvantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Deidre goes, "(laughs) You silly, tiny man-- No, seriously. We have a price agreed upon. Pay it."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, no, I got it. I got 50 gold of my own.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. 20 from me, 50 from him. We'll take them both.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It takes you a few hours and gets you into the early parts of the evening, but you do manage to go ahead and complete it. You manage to get it finished up and you're pretty proud of your work, actually, and you feel-- the whistle you're still doing as you do the final bits, you realize is the song that Scanlan sang for you, just looping in your head. It happened to push you through your work and get your final piece completed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's not complicated, but I've got a good design, and it has two nifty things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't actually have fingers. It's a mitt piece, strap-on, it can lock the thumb and lock the hand so you can open it, lock, close it, lock. It's got little flip-locks.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You can detach the hand and put a pick spike on for mining. Like a mining punch.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it like Young Frankenstein? (mechanical sound effects)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's more Dustin Hoffman "Hook", but, you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Because it's got the click, pull, click.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can do it with all these things. I can graph it. So.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. As the sun begins to set in Vasselheim, you make your way back over to the Braving Grounds, which as you look across, too, as the night goes dark, the Braving Grounds itself has a whole different life to it. There are so many forges and smelters going that there's-- most buildings have this bright orange glow through the ceiling and these various openings where fumes and smoke and exhaust are sent up from the various production constructs and such. It has this very luminescent look in comparison to a lot of the city. It's very interesting. It reminds you of the deep, deep portions of Kraghammer, where most of the actual fire and melted rock was being smelted and gathered and heated. So you make your way to the hovel. The roof workers are no longer there, and the door is closed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It takes you a few hours and gets you into the early parts of the evening, but you do manage to go ahead and complete it. You manage to get it finished up and you're pretty proud of your work, actually, and you feel-- the whistle you're still doing as you do the final bits, you realize is the song that Scanlan sang for you, just looping in your head. It happened to push you through your work and get your final piece completed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I also carved a little message inside that will not matter unless it actually becomes pertinent.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You don't get to know until you ask offscreen.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Try me. Okay. Do you go and deliver it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I do go and deliver it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It has been steeped way too long.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to stop and attach and begin strapping this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let me show you. It attaches like this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Here are the two switches. (clicking) And for your mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I grab, hit the button, twist, pull.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I get the spike and attach it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Remove it, put the hand back on. Tea?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Why not? Always say yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Need another cup. (grunts)" He stands up and goes over, still holding the kettle and splashing everywhere, and he's flipping through cabinets and knocking pieces of glass out. "Ah! Found it." Pulls out another little ceramic cup and pours the tea in, sets it down. (chink, click) "(cackles)"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is pungent. It is bitter.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, as you guys walk outside of the Slayer's Take guildhall, you find the nearest tree, which you've used before to traverse. As you all step through the portal, Percy and Scanlan look over their shoulder at the distant skyport and see the one airship docked there and think, "One day..."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We have an instant ability to transport anywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It would be so cool, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then we wouldn't have to go to Whitestone. It would hold all of our things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When we kill all the dragons...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We could hold all of our things on the airship, and I could have cannonades...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That will be the first thing we do when Thordak dies is we jump on an airship.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We'll buy it with all of the gold that we've stolen from all the dragons. It'll be great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We won't need the airship if the dragons are dead.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All the fun has gone out of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Before we leave, do you want to sell these stupid white dragon scales?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (repeats piercing spell noise) Through a tree!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys emerge. Due to the time differences, you land here in Whitestone, looking at where the sun is in the sky, it's early afternoon, as opposed to the morning where you guys just stepped away from. There are people in the streets, and you see a few, a little bit of life has returned to this town square, though still, by comparison-- there are folks now that are bringing in actual, healthy, looks to be fruits from nearby trees. There's a little bit of trade going on. This is the first real chance you've had to see a little bit of Whitestone coming to life again. As you emerge from the tree, a few individuals nearby stop and look and smile and wave, recognizing you as you approach.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like kill us all? No no no. Say they go first. "Go, go, go, go." And I kind of start teleporting through the tree and while I'm in the Sun Tree I just want to be like, "Hey, boo."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: "I missed you. Have you heard of this whole cancerous tree situation in the Feywild?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Shh, no. I'm in the middle of the tree. I'm in the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you finish this thought, you hear this sound emerge (vacuum sealing sound) and realize it's the sound of the whole portal you've made closing behind you because it only lasts for six seconds and you should probably get the hell out of the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Aww. I step out of the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you step out, a voice goes, "Hey, boo, sorry.(kiss noise)" (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "So I've heard from all sorts of interesting folk. I only hope one day to wear clothes as fine as you."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Walks over to you, Pike, and kneels down and gives you a little pinch on the cheek and is like, "Looking as spry and smiley as ever, I see."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I give him a kiss on the cheek.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He turns to you. "Vex'ahlia, look at you. I hear, if my words say correct, that you folks are a recent dragon-slaying bunch, hmm?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And goes to Scanlan and goes to ruffle your hair, and goes, "And you, you, my little bardish friend."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Embrace it! It's what makes you different."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's true, I suppose. I suppose. Yes, absolutely. We've been spreading the good word about you and your works.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. Not a worry. All right, so as the sun sets, you find your way down to the proper dinner table. Gilmore is there, Eskil is there, Cassandra is there...

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I just. I don't know. It's still something that I need to think about.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You pray to your Sarenrae about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughs) You do look lovely, though, in your dress.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do a little air cantrip to make the skirt poof out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hey, do you guys mind tying me up a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (strained) No, but that means it's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I assume there's clean clothes for everybody in their quarters?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Yeah. I paid money for this thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to arrange for our stuff to be stowed in the vault.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Within the next 15 minutes or so, before food is brought to the table, Allura finally enters in a very, very nice dress, and says, "It is so good to see you all are safe."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Yeah. I paid money for this thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to arrange for our stuff to be stowed in the vault.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Not a worry. All right, so as the sun sets, you find your way down to the proper dinner table. Gilmore is there, Eskil is there, Cassandra is there...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fine outfits have been provided for the men, if they wish to wear them, as well. Some do not.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'll dress up. I'll dress up for dinner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. As you guys sit down, pleasantries are exchanged-- (yawns) Pardon me. You catch up a bit with Cassandra. Partway through--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sit down, have a beer, watch our game.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well..." She looks over this way and Kima walks in, for the first time you've seen her really out of armor since you first saw her. Her hair is also in similar braids to her side and she herself is wearing a golden dress, though she's kind of like...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fine outfits have been provided for the men, if they wish to wear them, as well. Some do not.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'll dress up. I'll dress up for dinner.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. As you guys sit down, pleasantries are exchanged-- (yawns) Pardon me. You catch up a bit with Cassandra. Partway through--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sit down, have a beer, watch our game.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Within the next 15 minutes or so, before food is brought to the table, Allura finally enters in a very, very nice dress, and says, "It is so good to see you all are safe."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She then gives you a big, wonderful hug.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How's Kima? We haven't seen her yet.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We're still delving into it, and it may be a little while before we figure this out, but this is the best I can ascertain with my knowledge at my disposal. And the Realmseer and Gilmore can back up this research. We've all worked together these past weeks and we're all kind of coming to the same conclusion." She gestures to Gilmore. Gilmore says, "I've only been on this case personally for a few days of rising health standards in my body and I've thrown everything I can at it, honestly, and it's all just come to nothing. Gone. (pthbbt)"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So it's fair to assume that at the other end of this is something old, something trapped, something hungry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Would it be in this plane or another?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have no idea. Everything we've attempted to put through it that had any sort of magical connection, whether it be through inter-planal scrying, anything that would bring us to the other side of this, is crushed, consumed, and transferred as part of it. None of our rituals or enchantments will let us see through this spinning marble, as you call it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You haven't put any blood through it, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm hoping that hasn't happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So nothing survives the transfer. It is destroyed into its... purest components, it sounds.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Or is it? Don't know? Is it that you have no idea what happened to things put through?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Hundred miles. There were reports of the white dragon a week ago, south of us. Far south of us."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can get one of them on our side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can only be so hopeful that they tear each other apart.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe the white one will want to help kill Thordak with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Turning them against each other is not a bad idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Our best hope, at this point, is just to amass power. We are not strong enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does the heart-stone make him even stronger than he already was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know, but he was not that large when we sealed him."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If we can pry it out of his body, we could shrink him down. Perfect plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then we could go inside a dragon again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We can go in another dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Every one of them, one after the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You seen any dragons on the outskirts of the town? Have there been any flyovers or close calls within, say, 50 to 100 miles or so? Any reports?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We're just getting now to that point. It may be a few weeks before we're ready to go. It's a lot to build and it's a very big space to protect, but me and Drake are working on some ideas. (sighs)"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If we can pry it out of his body, we could shrink him down. Perfect plan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Then we could go inside a dragon again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We can go in another dragon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Every one of them, one after the other.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You seen any dragons on the outskirts of the town? Have there been any flyovers or close calls within, say, 50 to 100 miles or so? Any reports?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hundred miles. There were reports of the white dragon a week ago, south of us. Far south of us."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Unless they know what's underneath the castle, there's nothing of value here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we know where Vorugal has taken up roost? No one knows?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No. I've tried to scry, but they're apparently protected against that now."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about means of protection for Whitestone. Do you have a defense planned? A warning system?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I'm sorry, it's been a very tense time."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we know where Vorugal has taken up roost? No one knows?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No. I've tried to scry, but they're apparently protected against that now."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about means of protection for Whitestone. Do you have a defense planned? A warning system?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We're just getting now to that point. It may be a few weeks before we're ready to go. It's a lot to build and it's a very big space to protect, but me and Drake are working on some ideas. (sighs)"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you know exactly how these heart-stones are forged?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They're not forged. They existed. They were the hearts of the primordial titans that existed on this world before the gods even came here."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They were the true denizens of this world, before any of us."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is an awesome dinner, by the way. Super good.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Perhaps rest is in order for all of us. It's been a lot. I'm so sorry. It's good to see all of you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about means of protection for Whitestone. Do you have a defense planned? A warning system?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We're just getting now to that point. It may be a few weeks before we're ready to go. It's a lot to build and it's a very big space to protect, but me and Drake are working on some ideas. (sighs)"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you know exactly how these heart-stones are forged?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They're not forged. They existed. They were the hearts of the primordial titans that existed on this world before the gods even came here."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They were the true denizens of this world, before any of us."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is an awesome dinner, by the way. Super good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm sorry, it's been a very tense time."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "All right, kiddies, sleep it is." Kima gets up and joins Allura, and they both leave. Gilmore stands up, Realmseer stands up. "All right, everyone. Rest well. See you in the morning. And, ah, glad you're all safe."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, seriously, it's good to see you all. I'm glad you're all right."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You should have been with us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I should've been with you. I didn't know you left!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's a house, really, but a bunch of bricks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Home is where you make it, Kima.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Object impermanence. (glug glug) Next time you're going there, you tell me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: On one condition. Don't wear any more dresses.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I like you in your armor better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's why I missed you." She reaches out and smacks your cheek.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A lot of time passes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sap. It's a sap. It's a tree sap. Put the whole thing together.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've had opium this whole time and you never...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You will find out when I present it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Everyone else going to rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. I ran out of dinner super fast and I ran outside of Vax's room and I took the jug and I whispered into it, "oil," and I poured one quart of oil on the ground outside of his door. Looked around real quick. Is there anyone in the hallway?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That was super awesome and I can't wait to see the outcome, but before that happens, I was standing right here when these two walked off, so I am waiting in the exact same spot for my sister to return.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few hours pass before she returns, but she eventually does.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sap. It's a sap. It's a tree sap. Put the whole thing together.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've had opium this whole time and you never...

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You will find out when I present it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Everyone else going to rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No. I ran out of dinner super fast and I ran outside of Vax's room and I took the jug and I whispered into it, "oil," and I poured one quart of oil on the ground outside of his door. Looked around real quick. Is there anyone in the hallway?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That was super awesome and I can't wait to see the outcome, but before that happens, I was standing right here when these two walked off, so I am waiting in the exact same spot for my sister to return.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You take his arm. You guys walk up along the hallway. He leads you to a staircase that leads up further, and he goes, "I know a lot has happened these recent months. I've been watching from afar, keeping tabs on your journey best that I can. But I still know so little." You ascend the lengthy staircase and you make your way to the higher floor. You eventually open an intricate door and walk out onto a wide balcony on that tower that overlooks the grounds and the castle before you. Beautiful moonlight, the night air. You see the moon is nearly full and the white light illuminates the densely-forested countryside surrounding the castle. He closes the door and walks up to you at the edge of the balcony, looking over it all, elbows on the edge. "Some time has passed, Vax. And much of the world moves on to newer, greater threats. But true pain never really heals." He turns to you and steps up to you, looking you close in the face. "You hurt me deeply. And continue to hurt. Agony, for weeks, months. Pain I had never experienced. (deepening to a growl) It's all I can think about."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look over and you see Gilmore pop his head in with a soft smile. "I'm sorry if I'm waking you up."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Here." And he produces what looks like a folded pile of material and throws it on the foot of your bed and goes, "Come, Vax, I made you a gift. Put it on, come walk with me awhile. We have a lot to talk about."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a very well-crafted silk robe of dark blue and black. Beaded, nice against the skin. It's really, really nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (quietly) Give me a minute. (louder) There's a wooden screen in the room. I go behind it and wipe any oil left off my butt. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Everything looks all right. And I put it on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. He waits for you patiently in the hallway. So he begins walking along. Puts his arm out to you.
